nodes.body: This stack trace includes a local Windows username/path (e.g. `C:\Users\patri\...`). Please redact personal identifiers (replace with placeholders like `C:\Users\<user>\...` or elide the user-site path) before committing proof artifacts to the public repo.

This stack trace includes a local Windows username/path (e.g. `C:\Users\patri\...`). Please redact personal identifiers (replace with placeholders like `C:\Users\<user>\...` or elide the user-site path) before committing proof artifacts to the public repo.

In this trace, the `guard.budget_exceeded` event includes `data.cost_usd: 0.051`, which appears to represent cumulative cost-used, not the incremental cost of that event. `agentguard report`/`summarize_trace` will treat `data.cost_usd` as another cost-bearing event and double-count, which is why the generated report shows `$0.1020` instead of `$0.0510`. Please rename this field to something like `cost_used`/`total_cost_usd` (or remove it) so report totals match the per-iteration costs.

The report shows `Estimated cost: $0.1020`, but the review-loop proof narrative and per-iteration costs indicate a $0.0510 total. After fixing the trace cost field (to avoid double-counting), please regenerate this report artifact so the numbers are internally consistent.
